negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -91.76, and worst fold rw_006 net PnL -17.78.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 20.4 total net PnL across 7 better and 2 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.
